services.title: Data Center Management
services.subtitle: Support Service
services.description:
BGTS provides end-to-end management of server, storage, virtualization, and backup systems within your critical data center infrastructure. Through proactive monitoring, capacity analysis, and our AI-supported operations approach, potential issues are detected early, calls are efficiently classified, and managed through the right escalation processes.

Planning corrective actions aimed at enhancing operational efficiency and developing automation processes are also included in the scope of service. This ensures continuous service continuity while continuously increasing system performance and operational maturity.

features.title: Call Reception & Triage
features.description: We answer all data center-originated calls 24/7; quickly determine priority, category, and impact area, routing to the right team.

features.title: Resolution Tracking & Escalation
features.description: We monitor open tickets under SLAs, involve relevant parties when needed, and maintain uninterrupted customer updates throughout the process.

features.title: Reporting & Trend Analysis
features.description: We present resolution times, recurring issues, and volume trends to the customer in regular reports, revealing operational improvement opportunities.

services.title: 24/7 Monitoring & NOC
services.subtitle: Managed Service
services.description:
The BGTS Network Operations Center (NOC) is built on a centralized platform created using modern monitoring technologies such as Zabbix, Prometheus, Grafana, and ELK Stack. While all infrastructure data is analyzed on a 'Single Pane of Glass', AI-supported alarm analysis ensures operations teams focus on real problems, minimizing unnecessary alert noise.

Thanks to autonomous runbooks and preventive actions, many issues are resolved automatically before an alarm sounds or upon first notification; continuously reducing the need for manual intervention.

features.title: Alert Consolidation & Service Trees
features.description: We normalize all monitoring sources, including Zabbix, Datadog, Grafana, CloudWatch, Prometheus, OpenTelemetry, and SNMP, under a common schema. Thanks to the service tree model, alerts are placed directly into business context.

features.title: AI-Supported Alarm Optimization
features.description: With dynamic threshold learning, alarms measure deviations from the normal behavior of the service, not a static figure left from installation. Achieving up to 63% reduction in alarm volume.

features.title: Self-Healing Automation
features.description: Automated recovery triggers on recurring fault patterns. If successful, a ticket opens and closes instantly; if it fails, an engineer takes over.

features.title: Synthetic Monitoring & NOC Org.
features.description: Critical user journeys are tested externally at the API chain level; CDN or regional problems are caught before user complaints occur.
